question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/parser/record/entity/topic/TopicMessageLookupEntityListener.java -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: mergeTopicMessageLookup()] Can an unprivileged external user submit two topic messages for the same topicId where the first has sequenceNumber = Long.MAX_VALUE - 1 and the second has sequenceNumber = 1, causing Range.closedOpen(Long.MAX_VALUE - 1, Long.MAX_VALUE).span(Range.closedOpen(1, 2)) to produce a range spanning nearly the entire long space, making subsequent REST API queries for that topic scan an enormous sequence number range and effectively freezing query responses?
